title: UK DElEd Admission 2025

detail.title: UK DElEd Admission 2025
detail.short_info: Apply online for Uttarakhand DElEd Admission 2025. Check eligibility, exam dates, fee, and application process for the two-year Diploma in Elementary Education program at ukdeled.com. Registration open from 7 Sept to 6 Oct 2025

content.text: The online application for the UK DElEd Admission 2025 is open from 7th September 2025 to 6th October 2025 on the official website ukdeled.com. Candidates aspiring to join the two-year Diploma in Elementary Education (DElEd) program in Uttarakhand must apply within this period

The UK DElEd Admission 2025 is organized by the Uttarakhand Board of School Education (UBSE) for candidates aspiring to become primary teachers through a two-year Diploma in Elementary Education program. This entrance exam is mandatory for admission to District Institutes of Education and Training (DIETs) and government-affiliated colleges across Uttarakhand. The full online application process is available at ukdeled.com, and all eligible graduates from recognized universities are encouraged to apply.

Online registrations begin on 7th September 2025 and remain open until 6th October 2025. Candidates must ensure they meet the eligibility criteria, including age and academic qualifications, before submitting their applications. Reserved categories such as SC/ST/OBC and persons with disabilities are provided concessions in age and qualifying marks, making the program accessible to diverse groups.
Check and Download - UK DElEd Admission 2025

rows: Online Submission of application through BSEU-DELED website : www.ukdeled.com
Last date for payment of fee through E-Banking or Debit/Credit Card by the candidate
Duration for corrections in certain particulars
As indicated on the Admit Card
As indicated on the Admit Card
Material to be brought on the day of examination
Downloaded Admit Card and ID Proof (any of the following documents such as Aadhar card/ Driving Licence/ Voter ID/Passport/ PAN Card

items: Educational Qualification: Must have passed graduation (any stream: science or non-science) from a university recognized by law in India before the notification publication date.
Age Limit: Minimum 19 years and maximum 30 years as of 01-07-2026 (age relaxations as per government rules).
Domicile: Candidates should have a domicile of Uttarakhand.
Employment Card: Possession of an Uttarakhand employment card is mandatory

rows: Free Job Alert Tools for Free! No Sign Up Required!

sections.heading: How to Apply For UK DElEd Admission 2025?

items: Visit the official website ukdeled.com.
Click on the New Registration link
Fill in personal and academic details accurately
Upload scanned photograph, signature, and thumb impression.
Pay the application fee online
Preview all entered information before submission
Submit the completed application form
Download and print the final submitted form for records
